resources.title: What Is Money
resources.description: Chapter 1 of My First Bitcoin discusses the history of money and what makes money sound, or not.

resources.title: Learn Me a Bitcoin
resources.description: A technical deep-dive into how Bitcoin actually works — from transactions and blocks to the scripting language and cryptography. Great for those who want to understand the protocol, not just use it.

resources.title: My First Bitcoin
resources.description: An open-source Bitcoin education curriculum built for anyone starting from scratch. Covers money, wallets, keys, and sovereignty in plain language.

resources.title: Operation Bitcoin
resources.description: For Service Members, Veterans, and their Family. Bitcoin education and career resources tailored to the military community.
